scripts.check-deps: node -e "const f=require('fs'),c=require('crypto');const want=c.createHash('sha256').update(f.readFileSync('package-lock.json')).digest('hex');let have;try{have=f.readFileSync('node_modules/.package-lock-hash','utf8')}catch{}if(want!==have){console.error('node_modules is out of sync with package-lock.json.\nRun: rm -rf node_modules && npm install');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.tokens:sync: npm run tokens:pull && npm run tokens
scripts.tokens:dump:
echo 'Run scripts/figma-dump-vars.js in the Figma dev console or via Claude Chrome extension.
Then: cp ~/Downloads/figma-vars-cache.json tokens/.figma-vars-cache.json'
scripts.predev: npm run check-deps && npm run tokens
scripts.prebuild: npm run check-deps && npm run tokens
